ourvision.title: Our Vision
ourvision.subtitle: Our Ambition

description.p1: Rhon Studios is building a long-term creative company focused on sustainable growth, strong intellectual property, and disciplined execution.

ourvision.com_description: At Rhon Studios, every project is approached with strategic clarity and production discipline. We operate lean, prioritize high-impact development, and build with scalability in mind. Our commitment is to create valuable intellectual property, maintain ethical production standards, and grow deliberately — transforming a focused two-founder studio into a respected independent brand.

text.p1: Rhon Studios is an independent video game development studio founded in 2025.
text.p2: Each world we create is designed to stay with you long after you finish playing, with immersive experiences that combine narrative, emotion, and style.

p1.p1: Rhon Studios operates under a code of excellence:

text.p2: Every action we undertake reflects our principles, keeping us independent, relevant, and valuable.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Led by industry veterans with a shared passion for innovative storytelling

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Stay Connected
community.description: We don't build in silence. Every decision, every prototype, every challenge is shared with those who want to see what it's like to build a real game studio from the ground up.

discord.title: Main Community
discord.description: Talk directly with the team, follow development in real time, and connect with others who share the same passion. This is where we're most active.

discord.text: Talk directly with the team, follow development in real time, and connect with the community.

twitter.text: Quick updates, sneak peeks, and conversations about game design.

instagram.text: Artwork, concept art, and the creative process behind Tonkori and Afterlight.

youtube.text: Video devlogs, gameplay prototypes, and behind-the-scenes content from the studio.

join_part.title: Join Rhon Studios
join_part.subtitle: Join Our World
join_part.description: We're building from passion. If you have talent and want to leave your mark, there's a place for you.

message.title: Message
message.placeholder: We love you, you are the best.

text.p1: From Rhon Studios, we truly appreciate everyone who stops by. We work hard every day to make people fall in love with our creations, just as we do.
text.p2: We do this not just for ourselves, but so you can see the world and its beauty the way we do.

newsLetter.title: Newsletter
newsLetter.subtitle: Subscribe to receive the latest news about our games

join_page.title: Our Opportunities
join_page.subtitle: Join Us
join_page.description: At Rhon Studios, we believe great projects are built by great people. We are a growing studio with no revenue yet, but with original IPs in development and a clear vision for the future. These opportunities are voluntary collaborations with no salary but with real and transparent conditions.

items.title: Official Credit
items.description: You will be officially credited in all games and projects you contribute to, ensuring your work and contributions are properly recognized.

items.title: Revenue Sharing
items.description: If a project you co-develop generates revenue after release, you will receive a previously agreed-upon share based on your level of involvement and contribution.

items.title: Real Hiring Path
items.description: Our goal is to build a stable team. As the studio grows and secures funding, outstanding collaborators will be given priority for future paid positions.

items.title: Real Production Experience
items.description: Work on real indie video game projects and gain hands-on experience in professional development workflows, including design, programming, art, testing, and publishing.

items.title: Full Flexibility
items.description: 100% remote collaboration with no fixed schedules, making it easy to balance with studies, work, or other projects. Tasks are organized around each team member's availability.

items.title: Recommendation Letter
items.description: Upon completing your collaboration, you may request a personalized recommendation letter highlighting your skills, responsibilities, and contributions to the project.

legal.title: Important Notice
legal.description: All collaborations are formalized through a written agreement specifying the role, revenue-sharing conditions, and terms of the relationship. This does not constitute an employment relationship. Rhon Studios operates with full transparency.

card.empty_area: No roles available in this area for this project.
